summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for MoonLight Trading OS Scenario B (Live Signals) + Multi-Source Data Feed + AI Coach integration. All 11 specified API endpoints tested successfully with 129/129 Jest tests passing.

Jest test suite - All 129/129 tests passing
